description_long: This object is a piece of sushi featuring a thick, curved slice of orange-pink fish, likely salmon, with distinct white marbling on its surface. The fish slice is draped over a compact mound of white rice, which is visible from the sides and slightly from underneath. The fish has a glossy, slightly ribbed texture, suggesting freshness and a moist surface. The rice grains are individually distinguishable, giving the base a textured, slightly irregular appearance. There are no visible garnishes, sauces, or additional toppings on the sushi. The sushi is presented without any packaging or plate, isolated against a plain background.
description: A realistic piece of salmon nigiri sushi with a glossy, marbled fish slice atop a textured mound of white rice.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved salmon slice draped over the rice, with the rice grains visible underneath.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the marbled pattern and ribbed texture of the salmon slice.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the salmon's curve and the rice base.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the rice mound and the underside of the salmon slice.
